---
hub_index: false
title: "SKOS Vocabularies"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

SKOS vocabulary guidance now lives in the canonical ontology conventions file.

- Conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Reusing standards + finding terms: <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/reusing-standards-salmon-data-terms.html>
